description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Refactor the crash screen, remove unused code, and remove the crash screen log analysis feature (as the analysis is inaccurate and misleading).  
2. Allow users to enable screenshot/screen recording on the crash screen in the launcher settings.  
3. Optimize the rendering performance of the player avatar in the launcher interface while aligning dp values with the actual View.  
4. Attempt to fix the freeze issue caused by repeated refreshing when editing offline skins on some devices, and add relevant logging to help locate the problem.

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.重构崩溃界面，删除无用代码，删除崩溃界面日志分析功能（因为分析并不准确且存在误导性）
2.允许用户在启动器设置中启用崩溃界面截屏/录屏功能
3.优化启动器界面内玩家头像渲染性能，同时使dp值与实际View对齐
4.尝试修复部分设备编辑离线皮肤时重复多次刷新导致的卡死的问题，并加入相关日志打印定位问题
